root.name: Change font size of the question on slide 7 to less than 18pt
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly changed the font size of the question 'Q: does IP address of host suffice for identifying the process?' on slide 7 to a value less than 18pt, and that the change is correct and not extraneous.

children.name: Font size of the target question is less than 18pt after modification
children.description: Checks that the font size of the question is strictly less than 18pt after modification.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides or features
children.description: Checks that no unrelated changes were made to slides other than slide 7, or to slide 7's animations/transitions or other features.

children.name: No extraneous text/font changes on other slides
children.description: Checks that text and font properties on slides other than slide 7 were not changed.

children.name: No extraneous changes to animations or transitions on any slide
children.description: Checks that no animation or transition was added, removed, or modified in the presentation.

children.name: No extraneous changes to slide 7
children.description: Checks that no extraneous changes were made to slide 7.

metadata.task: Slide 7: Change the font size of the question 'Q: does IP address of host suffice for identifying the process?' to be smaller (less than 18pt)
